methods.byte[] bytes(): Returns the response as a byte array.
methods.InputStream byteStream(): Returns the response as a stream of bytes.
methods.Reader charStream(): Returns the response as a character stream decoded with the charset of the Content-Type header.
methods.void close(): Closes this stream and releases any system resources associated with it. If the stream is already closed then invoking this method has no effect
methods.long contentLength(): Returns the number of bytes in that will returned by bytes(), or byteStream(), or -1 if unknown.
methods.MediaType contentType(): Returns the high-level media type, such as "text", "image", "audio", "video", or "application".
methods.ResponseBody create(MediaType contentTyp: Returns a new response body that transmits content.
Returns a new response body that transmits content.
Returns a new response body that transmits content.
methods.okio.BufferedSource source(): Returns the raw response body as a stream of bytes.
methods.String string(): Returns the response as a string decoded with the charset of the Content-Type header.
